message:
chore(beads): file tensor_kron perf regression (frankentorch-ys3y)

[review-fix] cross-review of fa1cf3d (tensor_kron generic-rank path)
flagged a MEDIUM perf regression: decode_coords allocates a Vec
per inner iteration of the doubly-nested loop, replacing a
constant-time inner body in the prior 2D-specialized path.
Filed for an implementer to pick up; reviewer pane does not claim
implementation work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -158,6 +158,7 @@
 {"id":"frankentorch-xsp","title":"Investigate beads/frankensqlite page-reuse integrity warning after writes","description":"## Context
`frankentorch-c84` diagnosed the residual `br doctor` / `PRAGMA integrity_check` warning in the FrankenTorch tracker.

## Findings
- live `.beads/beads.db` remained operational and in sync with `.beads/issues.jsonl`
- an isolated rebuild from canonical JSONL (`.beads/beads.db.rebuild_c84_20260407T013146Z`) reproduced the `Page N: never used` integrity warning
- a `VACUUM INTO` rewrite (`.beads/beads.db.vacuum_c84_20260407T013244Z`) passed `integrity_check`, `quick_check`, and `br doctor --db ...`
- after promoting the vacuumed copy to canonical `.beads/beads.db`, subsequent normal `br` operations reintroduced the warning (`page 19 is never used`)

## Interpretation
This looks like a `beads_rust` / frankensqlite writer bug or page-accounting bug, not JSONL drift and not unrecoverable logical data corruption.

## Artifacts
- `artifacts/beads_recovery/c84_snapshot_20260407T013033Z/`
- `.beads/beads.db.rebuild_c84_20260407T013146Z`
- `.beads/beads.db.vacuum_c84_20260407T013244Z`
- `.beads/beads.db.bad_20260407T013409Z`
- `artifacts/beads_recovery/c84_checkpoint_test_20260407T013229Z.db`

## Next step
Trace which write path (export, write_probe, cache rebuild, or WAL handling) is reintroducing unreachable pages after a clean vacuum.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-07T01:35:07.977449573Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-07T03:04:23.065716327Z","closed_at":"2026-04-07T03:04:23.065440955Z","close_reason":"Investigated and isolated to import-only / auto-import blocked_issues_cache rebuild path; follow-up tracked separately","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankentorch-xt9","title":"Add complex tensor real/imag/conj session ops","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-03-31T17:42:34.746744038Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-31T17:51:21.853786071Z","closed_at":"2026-03-31T17:51:21.853530317Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankentorch-xyq","title":"Fail closed on non-finite histc inputs and bounds","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-03-30T00:04:04.717732283Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-30T00:06:15.928299429Z","closed_at":"2026-03-30T00:06:15.928123987Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
+{"id":"frankentorch-ys3y","title":"tensor_kron generic path allocates a Vec per inner iteration (perf regression)","description":"fa1cf3d generalized tensor_kron to arbitrary ranks but the new generic path calls decode_coords inside the doubly-nested loop over a_vals x b_vals, allocating a fresh Vec<usize> of length rank for EACH iteration. For a 2D x 2D kron of 100x100 inputs that is 100M Vec allocations replacing what was a constant-time inner loop in the previous specialized 2D path.

Fix sketch: precompute strides for a_aligned, b_aligned, and out_shape ONCE before the loop. Inside the inner loop iterate over a_linear and b_linear directly, accumulating out_linear via stride math without intermediate coordinate Vecs. The stride for out at dim d is product(out_shape[d+1..]); a_aligned coordinate d contributes a_coord*b_aligned[d]*stride_out[d]+b_coord*stride_out[d] which can be precomputed as a per-(a_linear,b_linear) table.

Severity: MEDIUM. Functionality is correct; this is a hot-loop allocation regression that did not exist in the prior specialized 2D path. Stalls a primary tensor algebra op for any non-trivial input size.

Reproduction: cargo bench (or a hand-rolled timing harness) on tensor_kron of two 64x64 inputs vs the pre-fa1cf3d code.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-28T21:50:01.464788698Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-28T21:50:01.464788698Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankentorch-yur","title":"Standardize remaining top-level oracle mirror wording in analysis docs","description":"Update the non-historical top-level oracle mirror wording in EXISTING_PYTORCH_STRUCTURE.md and EXHAUSTIVE_LEGACY_ANALYSIS.md to use repo-relative `legacy_pytorch_code/pytorch` phrasing, while leaving the historical measured-from absolute path untouched.","notes":"Standardized the non-historical top-level oracle mirror wording in EXISTING_PYTORCH_STRUCTURE.md and EXHAUSTIVE_LEGACY_ANALYSIS.md to the same repo-relative `legacy_pytorch_code/pytorch` phrasing used by the other authoritative docs, while leaving the historical measured-from path untouched.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"docs","created_at":"2026-03-28T05:46:02.668383090Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-28T05:46:29.975320879Z","closed_at":"2026-03-28T05:46:29.974705662Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankentorch-z2w","title":"Revalidate beads recovery workflow after beads_rust#224 is fixed","description":"Follow-up to frankentorch-wze.\n\nOnce Dicklesworthstone/beads_rust#224 lands, rerun the archived xsp probe matrix against a freshly vacuumed recovery DB and confirm whether the blocked_issues_cache import path still leaks old pages.\n\nAcceptance:\n1. Repeat the recovery probe matrix using the existing artifacts/beads_recovery/xsp_* fixtures as the reference workflow.\n2. Verify whether br sync --import-only --json and formerly auto-importing commands keep PRAGMA integrity_check clean.\n3. If clean, remove the temporary --no-auto-import recovery warning from AGENTS.md and the recovery report.\n4. If not clean, update the upstream issue with fresh findings and keep the local workaround in place.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-08T19:11:23.755208071Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T20:46:06.366935679Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T20:46:06.360383287Z","close_reason":"Revalidated after upstream #224 closure: archived xsp JSONL import matrix now preserves integrity with br 0.1.38, but current FrankenTorch JSONL still triggers orthogonal SQLite free-space corruption on import/auto-import. Local AGENTS/report workaround kept, upstream issue commented with fresh matrix, and residual follow-up filed.","external_ref":"https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_rust/issues/224","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
